fields.description: Segments where computed speed exceeds this value (km/h) are treated as GPS errors and discarded.
fields.label: Max Realistic Speed (km/h)

fields.description: Segments shorter than this distance (metres) are treated as GPS jitter and discarded.
fields.label: Min Distance Threshold (metres)

fields.description: GPS points with a horizontal accuracy worse than this value (metres) are discarded.
fields.label: Max GPS Accuracy (metres)

fields.description: Gaps between consecutive points longer than this (seconds) are treated as session breaks and not counted as travel time.
fields.label: Session Gap Threshold (seconds)

fields.description: If an employee has more raw GPS points than this per day, processing is capped and a warning is logged.
fields.label: Max Points Per Employee Per Day

fields.description: Enqueue each employee as a separate background job for large deployments.
fields.label: Enable Parallel Processing

fields.description: Enable verbose per-segment debug logging. Disable in production.
fields.label: Enable Debug Logging
